release_notes: 1.0.39: Fundus Phase 1a — Auth-Tokens (HMAC, login liefert access_token, Soft-Middleware mit AUTH_ENFORCE-Schalter, change-password + must_change_password) + 6 neue SPA-Endpoints (/api/chat, /api/norms/search, /api/floor-plans/ask + ask-direct, /api/documents/upload, /api/norms/upload). + python-multipart.
